[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Outdoor Banners # Custom Outdoor Banners ### Custom Outdoor Banners and Signs ![Outdoor Banner on a fence displaying ](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/22-4-13-Outdoor-Banners-1025x325.jpg) * [Product Overview](#df86ac62-3c59-4d50-b324-b5fdb709dc06) * [Material Options](#1baee1e8-c4d8-4c56-971d-3463866274da) * [Finishing Options](#d7ac5233-0f6f-4724-a0f1-d582a4a68705) * [Artwork Specs](#e54ed92d-8237-4d87-ad8a-bd0b03406df5) * [Production Times](#241b4da7-3908-4630-a426-09aaed9dce3a) * [Payment Options](#83b1f92e-adf9-46f7-818d-0abdbc026bc2) * [Shipping Guidelines](#0468afcb-0345-473c-9d56-22182039c6e9) **_Due to the latest shipping regulations, all outdoor vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please [contact us](https://www.banners.com/quotes) to get a custom freight quote._** Make the most of your next event with an eye-catching outdoor vinyl banner. These durable banners are easy to install and relocate and provide a convenient and flexible advertising solution. Their portability and durability in outdoor weather conditions allows businesses to adapt to changing marketing needs and target different locations, maximizing exposure and reaching a broader audience. Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a top notch, personalized outdoor banner that you’re proud to hang. We take meticulous care in our craft and collaborate closely with you to bring your vision to life. Our commitment to quality is evident through rigorous checks, ensuring that every banner meets our high standards. If anything falls short, our in-house graphic designers will promptly contact you to address and rectify it. Your satisfaction remains our top priority. We offer a wide selection of custom outdoor vinyl banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1’x1’ to 8’x50’, Enjoy unlimited design possibilities using our online designer, and tailor the production time to ensure your banner arrives precisely when you need it. Initiate your order today and, should you have any inquiries, don't hesitate to reach out to our dedicated in-house customer support team. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. #### Four Customizable Banner Materials Our outdoor banners are made from heavy-duty materials like vinyl and mesh, designed to withstand harsh weather conditions, including rain, wind, and UV exposure. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. 13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. 13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners Our high-quality 13oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high end look. 18 oz Vinyl Banners Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luste
